betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fission Products: I-131, Cs-137, Sr-90, Po-210§f

§aRecyclable isotopes from nuclear waste — RTG fuel, salted nuke components, and more!§f

§6Iodine-131 (Radiodine)§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: extremely high (pyrophoric)
§b• Source§f: ~6.3% of Short-Lived Nuclear Waste
§b• Uses§f: None currently

§6Caesium-137§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: §e20 RAD/s§f
§b• Source§f: ~9% of Short-Lived Nuclear Waste (average), also from MOX and HEP-239 research reactor fuel
§b• Uses§f: Planned for salted nukes (not yet implemented)

§6Strontium-90§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: §e15 RAD/s§f
§b• Source§f: ~5.5% of Short-Lived Nuclear Waste, also from MOX and HEU-233 research reactor fuel
§b• Key Use§f: §bHigh-Mid Tier RTG Pellet§f — §e15 power/tick§f
• Lifespan with RTG decay: §e208,800,000 ticks§f (~4 real months, 43.5 in-game years)
• Total lifetime power: §e3,132,000,000§f
• Decays to: Zirconium pellets

§6Polonium-210§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: §e75 RAD/s§f (pyrophoric)
§b• Sources§f:
  • Recycling spent Ra226Be neutron sources (RBMK & Research Reactor)
  • Cyclotron production (from iodine or mercury)
  • Nether plutonium ore centrifuging (if enabled)
§b• Key Uses§f:
  • §bPo210Be RBMK Neutron Sources§f — better than Ra226Be
  • §bRTG Pellet§f — §e50 power/tick§f, lifespan 9,936,000 ticks (~6 real days, 2 in-game years)
  • §bSelf-Charging Battery§f — §e1.25 kHE/t§f
  • Transmutation into Yharonite
  • Polonium glass (novelty)

§eTip§f: Sr-90 and Po-210 are the §emost valuable fission products§f — they make excellent RTG pellets for remote or unattended power. Set up a SILEX to process your short-lived waste and extract them!
betterquesting:10.name:8: Fission Products: I-131, Cs-137, Sr-90, Po-210
